bead.title: Stage 2.8: Mutation resolvers — bead lifecycle (5 mutations)
bead.description: Implement mutation resolvers for beadCreate, beadUpdate, beadClaim, beadUnclaim, beadReopen. New file cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_mutation_beads.go. Each wraps the existing bead.Store method. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 2 bead #21.
bead.acceptance: (1) Integration test for each mutation. (2) MANUAL: in GraphiQL, beadCreate a test bead, verify with `ddx bead show <id>`. beadClaim it, see status=in-progress in `ddx bead show`. beadUnclaim, beadReopen — each step matches between GraphQL and CLI.
